news.t: CommentSold Revolutionizes Video Commerce with the Launch of PopClips - Shoppable Videos Across all Its Platforms

holdings.infoBox: PDP is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are Comfort Systems USA stock at 3.06%, Apple at 2.99%, Amphenol at 2.89%, Western Digital at 2.86%, and Carpenter Technology at 2.72%.

overview.description: The Invesco Dorsey Wright Momentum ETF (PDP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dorsey Wright Tech Leaders TR index. The fund tracks an index of 100 US-listed large- and mid-cap companies selected and weighted by relative stock performance. PDP was launched on Mar 1, 2007 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: CommentSold Revolutionizes Video Commerce with the Launch of PopClips - Shoppable Videos Across all Its Platforms
data.text: LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CommentSold, a leader in video commerce technology, is thrilled to announce the launch of PopClips, a cutting-edge feature that brings shoppable videos on all its platfor...
